final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of Korean cafe-style coffee and desserts, smartphone-shot for Instagram, no people.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Instagram story aesthetic, hand-drawn annotation overlay
Composition: 
Subject: coffee and desserts, Korean cafe style
Scene/backdrop: Korean cafe interior
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）
Constraints: no people in frame; hand-drawn white line annotations with rough, uneven single-stroke style; contour lines tracing object outlines; arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance; decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoji) moderately added with intentional white space; diary-like short comments on taste, texture, atmosphere, and overall summary; Instagram story / magazine rough note aesthetic; fashionable and relaxed mood
Avoid:
